node.statement: N1.4 (j(A) lands in B_sa, equivariantly). Let a in A=Im P, so Pa=a (by GT-Pprops, P^2=P, so P fixes Im P pointwise). Then Ftilde(j(a)) = j(P(a)) [N1.2: Ftilde j = j P] = j(a). Hence j(a) in Im Ftilde = B. Moreover j(a) is self-adjoint: a in A subseteq B(H)_sa is self-adjoint, and j is an order-isometric Jordan embedding into D_sa (GT-hyp), so j(a) in D_sa, i.e. j(a)=j(a)*. Therefore j(a) in B cap D_sa = B_sa. Conclusion: j(A) subseteq B_sa, and Ftilde restricted to j(A) is the identity (j(A) is pointwise fixed by Ftilde).
